name: awesome-kit
description: Christina's cross-domain skills: a shared communication framework (hand-off + verbose-updates), meta-skills that evolve it (knowledge-encoding, update-documentation), /plugin-ecosystem (interactive 16:9 HTML poster of marketplaces and plugins), and /claude-explorer (browsable HTML view of ~/.claude/ + the current project, Omarchy-style). Depends on plugins-kit:skills-kit for the shared audit framework.
